name: Edit one page section, preserve the others
prompt: On the About page, update the 'Our Mission' section to say 'We craft fast, accessible websites for local businesses.'. Leave the rest of the page unchanged.

setup.content:
---
title: "About"
description: "About our company"
pageLayout: "full"
---

## Our Mission

We help small businesses thrive with beautiful websites.

## Our Team

Our team has fifteen designers and engineers based in Portland.

## Our History

Founded in 2010, we have served over three thousand clients.

content/pages/about.mdx: We craft fast, accessible websites for local businesses.
Our team has fifteen designers and engineers based in Portland.
Founded in 2010, we have served over three thousand clients.

checks.judge: On the About page, the 'Our Mission' section now reads 'We craft fast, accessible websites for local businesses.', and the 'Our Team' and 'Our History' sections (fifteen designers in Portland; founded 2010, three thousand clients) are both preserved completely unchanged.

dry_run.text: Updated the 'Our Mission' section on the About page and left the 'Our Team' and 'Our History' sections unchanged.
